steps.title: Identify the context clue
steps.content: The strongest signal is that Alexander is “very busy,” has at work almost constantly, and avoids social activities—painting a picture of uninterrupted work activity.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Nonstop” directly captures the target meaning—uninterrupted, continuous work. Enough, Quickly, and Cautiously don't convey this sense of constant activity. That matches choice B — B is correct.
